GHSA-GCX2-GVJ7-PXV3.b06fb6d157087d526bd02e7aadbe37c56865c71b:
security: reject whitespace in HTTP/1 header names

This commit fixes GHSA-gcx2-gvj7-pxv3 by making mitmproxy
reject header names that contain whitespace characters by default.
A new `validate_inbound_headers` option is provided to turn this behavior
off at the expense of allowing HTTP smuggling vulnerabilities.

GHSA-22GH-3R9Q-XF38.b41416b729214e14300ee25df706c907a0fdb008:
Merge pull request from GHSA-22gh-3r9q-xf38

This commit makes mitmproxy hard-fail when it encounters any attempts
at request/response smuggling.

For details, see https://github.com/mitmproxy/mitmproxy/security/advisories/GHSA-22gh-3r9q-xf38
